title: My Tickets
subtitle: Track the issues you have reported.
empty: You haven't reported any issues yet.

report.title: Report an issue
report.description: Describe the problem and our team will follow up.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what happened and the steps to reproduce it.
report.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
report.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5 MB each

complaint.button: Report an issue with this ticket
complaint.title: Report an issue with this ticket
complaint.description: Tell us what went wrong — for example, the reviewer did not answer properly.
complaint.detailsPlaceholder: Explain what went wrong with how this ticket was handled.
complaint.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
complaint.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5 MB each

suggest.title: Submit a suggestion
suggest.description: Share an idea to improve the system. Our team reviews every suggestion.
suggest.subjectPlaceholder: A short title for your idea
suggest.detailsPlaceholder: Describe your suggestion in more detail.
suggest.success: Thanks! Your suggestion has been submitted.
suggest.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
suggest.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5 MB each

mySuggestions.title: My suggestions
mySuggestions.subtitle: Improvement ideas you've submitted.
mySuggestions.empty: You haven't submitted any suggestions yet.

replies.title: Conversation
replies.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete message
deleteConfirm.description: This permanently removes the message and any replies to it. This can't be undone.

review.closeDescription: Closing marks the ticket resolved. Add a comment explaining the resolution.
review.commentPlaceholder: Describe how the issue was resolved…

reportForm.title: Add a report
reportForm.description: Record the issue you identified and the solution you applied.
reportForm.solutionPlaceholder: What did you do to resolve it?
reportForm.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop or click to attach images
reportForm.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF · up to 5 MB

editDialog.title: Edit ticket
editDialog.description: Update the subject or description of your ticket.

deleteDialog.title: Delete ticket
deleteDialog.description: This removes “{title}” from your tickets. This cannot be undone.
